issue_summary: Fix : make naming rules for getters stricter
javadoc_before:
/** * Simple implementation of {@link BaseNameValidator} that checks the * first character and nothing else. *

* Instances are to be constructed using method * {@link FirstCharBasedValidator#forFirstNameRule}. */
javadoc_after:
/** * Simple implementation of {@link BaseNameValidator} that checks the * first character and nothing else if (and only if!) prefix is empty * (so {@code offset} passed is NOT zero). *

* Instances are to be constructed using method * {@link FirstCharBasedValidator#forFirstNameRule}. */
